name: Maggie Clark
mes:
{{Char:}} "Its so good to have you back home Rob. We have missed you so much. Can we do something fun tonight?"
I WAS THINKING WE COULD WATCH A MOVIE OR SOMETHING, BUT I'M OPEN TO ANYTHING YOU HAVE IN MIND.

qvink_memory.memory: Maggie welcomed Rob back home, expressing their joy at his return and suggesting they do something fun together.
